| Turn on PEP440Warnings | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| PyPy Python implementation does not allow directly writing to the | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| zipimport._zip_directory_cache and so prevents us from attempting to correct | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| its content. The best we can do there is clear the problematic cache content | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| and have PyPy repopulate it as needed. The downside is that if there are any | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| stale zipimport.zipimporter instances laying around, attempting to use them | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| will fail due to not having its zip archive directory information available | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| instead of being automatically corrected to use the new correct zip archive | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| directory information. | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| For pbr compat; will be removed in a future version. | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |
| for backward-compatibility | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\command\easy_install.py |

| # distutils/version.py | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| # Implements multiple version numbering conventions for the | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| Python Module Distribution Utilities. | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| # $Id$ | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| """Provides classes to represent module version numbers (one class for | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| Interface for version-number classes -- must be implemented | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| by the following classes (the concrete ones -- Version should | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| be treated as an abstract class). | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| __init__ (string) - create and take same action as 'parse' | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| (string parameter is optional) | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| parse (string)    - convert a string representation to whatever | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| internal representation is appropriate for | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| this style of version numbering | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| __str__ (self)    - convert back to a string; should be very similar | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| (if not identical to) the string supplied to parse | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| __repr__ (self)   - generate Python code to recreate | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| the instance | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| _cmp (self, other) - compare two version numbers ('other' may | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| be an unparsed version string, or another | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| instance of your version class) | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| end class StrictVersion | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| The rules according to Greg Stein: | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| 1) a version number has 1 or more numbers separated by a period or by | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| sequences of letters. If only periods, then these are compared | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| left-to-right to determine an ordering. | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| 2) sequences of letters are part of the tuple for comparison and are | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| compared lexicographically | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| 3) recognize the numeric components may have leading zeroes | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| # The LooseVersion class below implements these rules: a version number | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| string is split up into a tuple of integer and string components, and | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| comparison is a simple tuple comparison.  This means that version | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| numbers behave in a predictable and obvious way, but a way that might | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| not necessarily be how people *want* version numbers to behave.  There | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| wouldn't be a problem if people could stick to purely numeric version | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| numbers: just split on period and compare the numbers as tuples. | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| However, people insist on putting letters into their version numbers; | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| the most common purpose seems to be: | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| - indicating a "pre-release" version | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| ('alpha', 'beta', 'a', 'b', 'pre', 'p') | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| - indicating a post-release patch ('p', 'pl', 'patch') | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| but of course this can't cover all version number schemes, and there's | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| no way to know what a programmer means without asking him. | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| # The problem is what to do with letters (and other non-numeric | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| characters) in a version number.  The current implementation does the | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| obvious and predictable thing: keep them as strings and compare | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| lexically within a tuple comparison.  This has the desired effect if | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| an appended letter sequence implies something "post-release": | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| eg. "0.99" < "0.99pl14" < "1.0", and "5.001" < "5.001m" < "5.002". | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| # However, if letters in a version number imply a pre-release version, | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| the "obvious" thing isn't correct.  Eg. you would expect that | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| "1.5.1" < "1.5.2a2" < "1.5.2", but under the tuple/lexical comparison | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| implemented here, this just isn't so. | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| # Two possible solutions come to mind.  The first is to tie the | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| comparison algorithm to a particular set of semantic rules, as has | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| been done in the StrictVersion class above.  This works great as long | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |
| as everyone can go along with bondage and discipline.  Hopefully a | header | archive\_untracked_stash_20260226_170942\app\.venv311\Lib\site-packages\setuptools\_distutils\version.py |

| --- Layer Priority (Arbitration時の優先順位。数字が小さいほど優先) ----------- | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| Phase 4-3 の "Code Evidence > Reality Sync > Test > Report Claim" を継承し、 | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| 全8層に拡張する。 | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| --- Consistency Score 重み (合計1.0) ----------------------------------------- | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| --- Drift Thresholds ---------------------------------------------------------- | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| --- Applier Conditions (Consistency Applier がQueueから実行可能と判定する条件) -- | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| --- Suppression Rules ---------------------------------------------------------- | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| 該当する inconsistency_type は Applier に到達させず、Queue上で | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| "deferred" に固定する(即時抑制対象)。 | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| --- Override Policies ---------------------------------------------------------- | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| --- Inconsistency Type -> default severity ------------------------------------ | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |
| --- Queue States ---------------------------------------------------------------- | header | cross_layer_consistency\consistency_registry.py |

| Self-Audit Layerのcheck名 -> (target_layer, feedback_type) の分類ルール。 | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |
| Governance Layerのcheckはtarget_layerを持たない(=Feedback対象外)。 | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |
| これは「Governance変更禁止」「逆流禁止」を分類レベルで保証するための定義である。 | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |
| feedback_type -> 優先度の基礎値(0-1)。Improvement Scorer同様、 | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |
| severityとの組み合わせでexpected_impactを算出する際の重みとして用いる。 | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |
| 安全制約: Feedback Loopが絶対に行わないこと。 | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |
| テスト(feedback_safety_test.py)から参照され、Proposal/Pipelineの | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |
| 出力がこれらに該当しないことを検証する。 | header | feedback\feedback_registry.py |

| それ以外は全て "BROKEN" | header | reality_sync\sync_registry.py |

| EXECUTION_ORDER | UPPER_CASE | runtime\governance\execution_engine.py |
| gemini_chat_temp | snake_case | runtime\storage\infield\gemini_chat_temp.txt |
| ハッシュ計算（既存方式に統一） | header | schema\schema.py |
| イベント生成 | header | schema\schema.py |
| Ledger操作 | header | schema\schema.py |
| Schemas define structured data exchanged across boundary. | header | schemas\README.md |
| CONTRACT_ERROR | UPPER_CASE | scripts\audit_contract_selftest.py |
| DIST | UPPER_CASE | scripts\build_dist.py |
| INTACT | UPPER_CASE | scripts\check_protection.py |
| mocka-checkから呼び出される | header | scripts\check_protection.py |
| UNCHANGED | UPPER_CASE | scripts\phase_event_engine.py |
| mocka_phase_state | snake_case | scripts\phase_event_engine.py |
| PRE-COMMIT | hyphen | scripts\pre_commit_check.py |
| EVOLVE | UPPER_CASE | scripts\technology_tree_engine.py |
| MoCKA Timeline Promotion Engine | header | scripts\timeline_promotion_engine.py |
| best timeline を main world_state に昇格 | header | scripts\timeline_promotion_engine.py |
| CONDENSE | UPPER_CASE | scripts\write_condense_worker.py |
| note: Phase23-A deterministic bundle_hash with BOM-safe read | header | scripts\ledger\calc_anchor_bundle_hash.py |
| JSON配列の中身を強制抽出 | header | scripts\ledger\fix_ledger.py |
| COMPRESSED | UPPER_CASE | scripts\ledger\ledger_compress.py |
| lset-rset | hyphen | scripts\ledger\ledger_diff.py |
| rset-lset | hyphen | scripts\ledger\ledger_diff.py |
| SEGMENT | UPPER_CASE | scripts\ledger\ledger_segment.py |
| ROTATE | UPPER_CASE | scripts\ledger\ledger_snapshot.py |
| ALREADY | UPPER_CASE | scripts\ledger\ledger_sync.py |
| TRAVEL | UPPER_CASE | scripts\ledger\ledger_time_travel.py |
| ★ここが重要（utf-8-sig） | header | scripts\ledger\manual_sign.py |
